title: The Sunny Is Threatened
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the sunny is threatened, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's exchange with Doflamingo collapses as Fujitora and the Marines tighten the trap, while the Sunny team faces danger at sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Nuahh!!! SHIT! Back on this damn ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Oh, it's JORA isn't it! Save me!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Black leg-ya! How's the "Factory destruction" plan coming along!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We know the facto- Ry's location, but frankly says that it's going to be much harder to destroy than we ever could have thought.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: And my father!? And what of Kanjuuro!?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Samurai is also at the factory. He'll be rescued when everything's said and done.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You just brought it from inside the cabin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Your heart is currently inside me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Shit!! So you had it all along!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Anyhow, you need to take this guy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: It's the next island. I thought I already gave you the VIVE- card.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: you say "next island," but what of Luffy-san and the others!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Once the factory is destroyed, we'll have no more business on this island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: So we'll follow along after you soon enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Absolutely not!! We're waiting!! There's no way we can set sail without our captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: We're the Strawhat crew, after all!!

summary: The Sunny Is Threatened focuses on Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as law's exchange with Doflamingo collapses as Fujitora and the Marines tighten the trap, while the Sunny team faces danger at sea.
